text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nghhh... Ugh, this doesn't work either.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I need a reset. Maybe Ishould post that other one first.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Okay, then listen carefully!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: If I win, you have to be my Droit date!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: All right. But don't lose, 'kay?<n>Otherwise, I'm going to the dance<n>with someone else!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. It's already Droit time. Not<n>that I really care... Huh? An email?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "Tracen Academy Student Council<n>President, Symboli Rudolf"? Why was<n>this sent to this address? ...Wait,<n>huh?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "You are requested to perform at the<n>Ligne Droite"?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tonight at the Ligne Droite

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The Ligne Droite... Commonly known<n>as the "Droit," this spectacular dance<n>party serves to celebrate the start of<n>a new school year, when the cherry<n>blossoms are in full bloom.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All the young ponies are adorable in<n>how they get so anxious in<n>anticipation of this big day. And while<n>finding the right outfit to wear is<n>important, the most crucial thing is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Looking for a partner to dance with in<n>the main event of the night. Yes! It's<n>finding the perfect date to celebrate<n>this incredible moment in one's life.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Snooore...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh no, am I boring you? Sorry about<n>that. Time to wake up, princess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What's the big fuss? Messing up my<n>nap on this beautiful day, talking<n>about "dro"... What's it called again?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The Droit, got it? I'm about to make<n>even more of a fuss, so I thought it<n>best to give a little background info<n>first. Now... I have something to ask<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky... would you do me the<n>honor of being my date?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa—what'd you just<n>say? Your "date"? You mean you<n>want me to be your partner for the<n>dance?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Precisely! They're holding an<n>exhibition dance at the Droit, you see.<n>In short, it'll be a big kickoff to the<n>main event.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I know this happens every year, but...<n>the president is working extra hard<n>this time. I wanted to help out, so I<n>proposed the exhibition idea to her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You don't say...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Not interested in the slightest, areyou? Well, everyone is busy withtheir races. But it'd just be sowonderful if they would all attend...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So you're goin' around acting as aspokesperson, I get it now. But whywould you ask me to be yourpartner?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to be blunt, but we're not super<n>close or anything, right? I'm not in<n>Ritto Dorm, and I'm not part of a<n>committee with you or anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: However, we are both students atthis academy. Isn't that closeenough? I suppose it is a bit of astretch. But aside from that...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're right. It's customary to ask<n>the person you have the closest<n>relationship with when choosing a<n>date.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The Droit is an important turning point.<n>So it's natural to spend the occasion<n>with a partner who's shared the<n>experiences you had the past year.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: "If I win, will you be mine?" Seriously,<n>some people choose their partner<n>based on who wins a race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm saying...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But this time, I'm going to be incharge of the exhibition dance. So I'mlooking to do just one thing—makingthe Droit the most thrilling it can be.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And if anyone is capable of doing<n>that... it could only be you, the<n>"Trickster" herself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...All right. I mean, I don't get your<n>reasoning one bit, but I see that<n>you're serious about this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So I guess I should be up-front with<n>you. My answer is "NO." I ain't goin'.<n>Find somebody else.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I know you're planning something<n>big, but the spotlight's not for me. I<n>don't dance in anything besides<n>winning concerts. Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I just don't have the time right now. I<n>was actually thinking of taking my<n>next race kinda seriously this time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm... Understood. Then how about<n>this for an idea? Let's make a little<n>deal.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a jump shot! You see how<n>high it went? I dunno how you do it,<n>Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's no fun, noexcitement, no challenge here... I'mdone with pool.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Uh, already?! And it's been forever<n>since I got to spend a day off with<n>you. Umm, there must be something<n>you'd find exciting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Oh, perfect timing! Hey, so like,<n>there's this track producer I'm really<n>into right now, and they just posted a<n>new song! Wanna hear it?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sure... Might as well.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: You'll love it! They're called<n>"!monad"—real identity's a total<n>mystery. Every so often they'll drop<n>a remix or new track on social media,<n>then go silent again!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: They're so good! The sound isaggressive and super tight! But it'sgot that old-school West Coast vibetoo! Killer!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: O-oh, yikes. Sorry, I got so excited!<n>Anyway, give it a try! Here's the<n>account.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: !monad... The profile is just their<n>username, and the only posts are<n>songs... Hm? This icon...

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: So, actually... Hehe, I dunno if it's<n>really gonna happen, but this year I<n>suggested—

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sirius, look!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're alive and well it seems, Sirius<n>Symboli.
